title: /kernel
summary_text: `/kernel` is the repo’s Kernel bootstrap command, but this chat/API session did not actually execute the local slash-launch path. I verified the contract in [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md), [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md), and [`.codex/prompts/kernel.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md). The static prompt check passes via `bash tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh`, but I cannot honestly emit a valid Kernel bootstrap acknowledgement here because the repo requires a live 6-lane, multi-model bootstrap, and this session has not launched that topology. If you want the real local bootstrap, use `kernel` or `codex-prompt-launch kernel` from a fresh repo-root Codex session, or `k4` for the 4-pane surface. If your intent was “switch this conversation into Kernel work,” give me the actual task and I’ll continue under the Kernel contract from here without pretending the launcher bootstrap already happened.
